india_trends.title: Metals rally masks growth hurdles at Hindustan Zinc
india_trends.summary: While high silver and zinc prices drove record earnings for the March quarter, the miner faces a years-long production plateau and rising costs due to geopolitical tensions.

india_trends.title: Exporters highlight compliance costs, testing requirements, MSME issues in meeting with Piyush Goyal
india_trends.summary: Industry representatives met with Commerce Minister Piyush Goyal to discuss compliance costs, testing, and MSME export challenges. Goyal assured support and urged leveraging trade pacts to boost exports, aiming for $2 trillion by 2030, building on the record $860.09 billion achieved in 2025-26.

india_trends.title: Embassy REIT to raise Rs 9,000 cr debt, FY26 distribution to unitholders up 10 pc to Rs 2,394 cr
india_trends.summary: Realty firm Embassy Office Parks REIT on Monday announced distribution of Rs 616 crore to unitholders for the March quarter, taking the total figures to Rs 2,396 crore during the last fiscal year.

india_trends.title: Tata Steel, JSW Steel, and more: Why are steel stocks at record highs today?
india_trends.summary: Steel company shares hit new highs as brokerage optimism increased due to improving global dynamics and strong earnings potential. Jefferies and Goldman Sachs project growth for Indian steel firms.

india_trends.title: Is Noida airport really a threat for GMR-owned Delhi airport? JM Financial analysts decode impact
india_trends.summary: Noida International Airport's opening will not severely affect Delhi airport's business. Experts predict only a small passenger shift, mainly domestic. International traffic and high-yield revenue streams for Delhi airport are expected to remain strong. Noida airport may even help Delhi manage futur

india_trends.title: Vedanta shares down 5% after demerger record date announcement — Tactical reset or value-buying opportunity?
india_trends.summary: While Vedanta stock has seen a sharp surge in its stock price of almost 80% in a year in expectation of the demerger, it has faced selling pressure since the record date was declared.

india_trends.title: NAM-India stock hits 52-week high on strong Q4 earnings
india_trends.summary: The company reported a net profit of ₹385 crore for the March quarter, marking a 29% increase y-o-y from ₹299 crore in the same period last year

india_trends.summary: Stock rises to ₹2,066.20 at 11.56 am, after hitting an intraday high of ₹2,073.20, compared with the previous close of ₹1,843.10

india_trends.title: ₹1.25 to ₹122.20: Multibagger penny stock turns ₹1 lakh into ₹98 lakh in six years
india_trends.summary: The share price of Websol Energy System, which was once priced at ₹1.25 in April 2020, is now trading at ₹122 on the NSE. Here's share price trend and investment growth of the multibagger penny stock.
